A '''Shistavanen Jedi''' fought on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] [[First Battle of Kamino|invaded]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] fought on the side of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] alongside a group of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the corridors of the [[Security Sector Six]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] forces bested the clones and the [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] and killed the troopers. The Jedi's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] was destroyed and their right arm injured. After their defeat, they were kneeling on the floor with a [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droid]] standing behind them, its [[Wrist blaster/Legends|arm cannon]] aimed at the Jedi.<ref name="Republic 50" />

==Appearances==
